docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIEGAND, JOSEF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3760 NORIEGA ST. #5, S.F. CA. 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIEGAND, JOSEF AS TO DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIEGAND, JOSEF SERVED DEC-19-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DEC. OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $36.67 AS TO DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HADAD, KAREN
